title: Master Void Spirit
content:
An ancient qi cultivator that survived the Heavenly Madness. Respected by Qing Shui and hated by 
Master Flamespark
. His brother is not as good as him.

Background
[
]

He was from ancient times. He was the one that refined an illusionary planet that is always burning in the Brilliant Void Hell. That planet was was thousands times later than 
Planet Tian Yun
; and thats how 
Planet Da Lou
 came to be.
